label: CompTIA SecAI+ Complete Course (Exam SY0-SAI+)
description: CompTIA SecAI+ Complete Course (Exam SY0-SAI+) is a comprehensive study notes course for IT certification exam prep, covering AI security theory, hands-on AI/ML threat labs, enterprise AI defense scenarios, and full exam readiness. It walks through all major SecAI+ domains, including AI fundamentals, prompt injection and model poisoning, secure AI pipelines and APIs, governance frameworks like NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act, SIEM/SOAR automation, and LLM application security, with practical demos, real-world examples, and FAQ/Q&A review for each topic.
